sessions.notes: s32 idx2 = D_800A3748; declared first in block before *(entry+0x5E)=1 store, then call. Retires the reorder 36,38,40,39,37,41 regfix rule. Insn count 60->58 matches target's 59 +/-1.

reviewer.evidence: Not invoked. Lever applied is the documented [[hoist-call-arg-local-flips-jal-delay]] pattern with confirmed sanctioned precedent (func_80060B70 / commit 6a0a83d0). idx2 has semantic content (call's arg0). Recommend reviewer invocation if/when candidate.c is applied to src/ at the score-3 floor.

remaining_gap.summary: 3 diffs in comparison block at maspsx idx 14-22: lhu lands in $v1 (target $a1); missing 'andi $v1, $a1, 0xFFFF' insn at idx 16; addiu in bnez delay slot uses $v1 (target $a1). The 3 are coupled: forcing GCC to materialize the andi would naturally allocate $v1 to the andi result and push lhu into $a1.
rules_in_remaining_cluster: func_8001EEB4: $3 <-> $5 @ 21-21 (addiu in delay slot reg swap)

rejected_forms.reason: Combine folds the redundant mask; no andi emitted. Same score as baseline.
GCC combine collapses lh+cast back to lhu equivalent. No andi materialization.
register keyword is a hint GCC ignores. No allocation change.
GCC compiles && and goto-end forms identically. No codegen change. Note: per [[goto-end-prologue-delay-slot]] using accumulator+shared-end purely for codegen would be a cheat anyway.

rejected_forms.form: s8 idx2 = D_800A3748; (not s32) as hoisted second-call arg
rejected_forms.reason: s8 type triggers lbu+sll24+sra24 expansion (extra 2 insns). Use s32 instead — lb directly without sign-ext shifts.

next_hypotheses: Apply the candidate's idx2 hoist + find an additional lever for the andi materialization. Score target: 0 (then retire to drop all 4 rules).

Find a source pattern that defeats combine's (and (mem:HI) 0xFFFF) -> (mem:HI) fold. Try: read via a struct field with int type that the original code masks at the read site, or a pattern where the lhu result flows through a longer RTL chain combine cannot collapse.

Read GCC 2.7.2 tools/gcc-2.7.2/combine.c for the specific simplify rule folding the andi here. Use instrumented cc1 (tmp/gccdbg/ with BB2_ALLOC_DEBUG / SCHED_DEBUG / PRIO_DEBUG hooks) to dump combine input/output for the lhu region. Per [[difficult-is-not-impossible]] this is the load-bearing diagnostic.

Cross-reference sibling functions with the same lhu/andi/beq pattern in target: func_8001A820 (empty body, no source clue), func_8001F938 (INCOMPLETE, score 11, 13 rules), calc_loc_mat_fw_80055B60 (ASM-STRUCTURAL park bucket). None have matched yet — solving one may unlock the others (or document the family's irreducibility).

Permuter from the candidate-floor-3 base. Set up permuter/func_8001EEB4/ with candidate.c as base, run with --stop-on-zero. Per the project's permuter discipline use clean single-function target.s + prelude.inc (drop .set gp=64).
